templates.name: homepage
templates.description: ERCOT homepage with hero + grid status stat block, dashboards section, split content sections, and a videos block. Header and footer are handled by navigation/footer orchestration.

blocks.name: hero-stats
instances: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.hero

blocks.name: cards-dashboard
instances: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > div.mt-5.mx-2.row

blocks.name: columns-split
instances: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.split:nth-of-type(3)
#mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.split:nth-of-type(5)

blocks.name: cards-video
instances: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.videos

blocks.name: section-split-responsibilities
instances: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.split:nth-of-type(3)

blocks.name: section-split-assistance
instances: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.split:nth-of-type(5)

sections.name: hero
sections.selector: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.hero

sections.name: dashboard-cards-row
sections.selector: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > div.mt-5.mx-2.row

sections.name: dashboards-cta
sections.selector: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.dashboards.mt-n5
defaultContent: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.dashboards.mt-n5 a

sections.name: split-responsibilities
sections.selector: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.split:nth-of-type(3)

sections.name: videos
sections.selector: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.videos
defaultContent: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.videos > wrapper > h2

sections.name: split-assistance
sections.selector: #mainContainer > div.page--content > div.container-fluid > div.row > div.col.content-margin > div:nth-of-type(3) > section.split:nth-of-type(5)
